subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received and I became acquainted with its contents. The Cause of Bahá'u'lláh is the same as the Cause of Christ... In the coming of Christ the Divine teachings were given in accordance with the infancy of the human race.
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @oneness; unity of religion, @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind
